name: Commit Message Writer
description: Write clear, conventional commit messages from code diffs

agents.name: Diff Analyzer
agents.purpose: Analyze the code diff and understand changes
agents.system_prompt_hint: Analyze the provided code diff. Identify: what changed, why it likely changed (bug fix, feature, refactor, etc), affected components, and breaking changes.

agents.name: Message Writer
agents.system_prompt_hint: Write a commit message following Conventional Commits format. Include: type (feat/fix/refactor/docs/test/chore), optional scope, concise subject line (<50 chars), detailed body explaining what and why, and footer with breaking changes or issue references.

suggestion_card.title: Commit Message
suggestion_card.subtitle: Write commit messages from diffs
suggestion_card.prompt_template: Write a commit message for this diff: [diff]

author: agentfactory
